<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Main IDE library providing functionality for palettes and other IDE add-ons.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Name: ideNewControl</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Type: message</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Syntax: on ideNewControl</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Summary: Sent when a control is created in the IDE</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Handle the &lt;ideNewControl&gt; message to respond to the creation of controls using one of the</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">IDE palettes, or the create command.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&gt;*Note:* The &lt;ideNewControl&gt; message is only sent to objects which have subscribed to it.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">See the &lt;revIDESubscribe&gt; command for more details.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: revIDESubscribe (command)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Called when loading the IDE library</font></i></p>

<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">":"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPreProcessed </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"execute"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">do</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPreProcessed</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">comma</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[pType]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>default</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> (pType </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.widget"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropsA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[pType] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tPropsA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">union</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropsA </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[</font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.Control"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">recursively</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropsA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>switch</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __classicObjectPropertiesFromType</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>on</b>  __setPropertyDataOfObjectFromFile pObjectType, pFile, pPropInfoA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the data from the file</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">URL</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#00007F">"file:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; pFile) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Parse the file into a structure array</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectPropertiesA, tCountsA, tGroupCountsA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">tab</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDataStart, tDataA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDataStart</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tLine </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLine </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLine </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"-----"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDataStart</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __propertyDataProcessLine(tLine) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"name"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"label"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[pObjectType][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Allow 'display title' of classic controls to be specified in property definition file</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"name"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"title"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> tDataStart <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"label"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[pObjectType][</font><font color="#00007F">"title"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tDataStart </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertyName</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tOverride </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Default can override to empty if it is the string "empty"</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"empty"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLineDataA[</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set to folder to the path where the object definition files for classic controls are stored</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectDefinitionsPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"Object Property Definitions"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectDefinitionsPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEPushDefaultFolder tObjectDefinitionsPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Read in each file and build an array</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">files</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> (tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the name of the object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectType </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"tsv"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectType</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pOptionalSection </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertiesArray[pOptionalSection]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertiesArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __objectPropertiesShared</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Information pertaining to the property &lt;pPropName&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pPropName (string): One of the IDE canonical object property names.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (array): An array of information pertaining to the given property.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">This function returns the information pertaining to the object property &lt;pPropName&gt;,</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">parsed from the file Toolset/resources/supporting_files/property_definitions.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Information about synonyms is not returned by this function. For a list of the canonical</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">property names which are valid inputs to this function, see the &lt;idePropertyNames&gt;</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: idePropertyNames (function)</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPropertyInfo pPropName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sClassicPropertiesInfo </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> sClassicPropertiesInfo[pPropName]</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPropertyInfo</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A list of the object property names considered canonical by the IDE</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectType (optional string): One of the IDE's object type IDs</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (string): A list of the object property names, one per line.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">This function returns a list of the object property names considered canonical by</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">the IDE, as parsed from the file Toolset/resources/supporting_files/property_definitions.txt.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">If the &lt;pObjectType&gt; parameter is used, this returns a list of the properties specific to</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">that object type, as parsed from the files in Toolset/resources/supporting_files/.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">For a list of the object type IDs which are valid inputs to this function, see the &lt;ideObjectTypes&gt;</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: ideObjectTypes (function)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> idePropertyNames pObjectType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sClassicPropertiesInfo </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectPropertiesInfo </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pObjectType </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicPropertiesInfo </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectPropertiesInfo[pObjectType] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">sort</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> idePropertyNames</font></p>

<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Information pertaining to the property &lt;pPropName&gt; in the context of &lt;pObjectType&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pPropName (string): One of the IDE canonical object property names.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectType (string): One of the IDE's object types.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (array): An array of information pertaining to the given property.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">This function returns the information pertaining to the object property &lt;pPropName&gt;,</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">parsed from the files in Toolset/resources/supporting_files/. In some cases an individual</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">property's data can be overridden for a particular object type.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">For a list of the canonical property names which are valid inputs to this function, see the</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&lt;idePropertyNames&gt; function. For a list of the object type IDs which are valid inputs</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">to this function, see the &lt;ideObjectTypes&gt; function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: idePropertyNames (function), ideObjectTypes (function)</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEObjectPropertyInfo pObjectType, pPropName</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEObjectPropertyInfo</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A list of the IDE object types corresponding to the list of objects given</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectIDs: A list, one per line, of object IDs</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: A list, one per line, of the IDE object types associated with</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">the objects in &lt;pObjectIDs&gt;</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideObjectTypesFromObjectList pObjectIDs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList, tObjectType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectIDs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideObjectTypeFromObject(tObjectID) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tObjectType </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectType &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideObjectTypesFromObjectList</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The IDE object type corresponding to the given object</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectID: An object ID</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: The IDE object type associated with the objects &lt;pObjectID&gt;</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">create field</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put ideObjectTypeFromObject(it)  -- outputs com.livecode.interface.classic.Field</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">set the listBehavior of it to true</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put ideObjectTypeFromObject(it)  -- outputs com.livecode.interface.classic.ListField</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&gt;*Note:* The type returned by &lt;ideObjectTypeFromObject&gt; can depend</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on the values of the object's properties.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   **/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideObjectTypeFromObject pObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>switch</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">word</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"stack"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">word</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"stack"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Substack"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Stack"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"card"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Card"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"group"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> dgProps[</font><font color="#00007F">"control type"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Data Grid"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> dgProps[</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Table"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.DataGrid"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.DataGridForm"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Group"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"field"</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError pMessage</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">global</font></b><font color="#000000"> gRevDevelopment</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tErrorContext, tErrorText, tLockedMessages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> -2 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">executioncontexts</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tErrorContext</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Unlock messages to ensure the errors get through to the message box</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">lockmessages</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000">  tLockedMessages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">unlock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"ERROR:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pMessage &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"line:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tErrorContext &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"handler:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tErrorContext &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"script object:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tErrorContext </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tErrorText</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If in IDE development mode output the error to the Message Box</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> gRevDevelopment </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tErrorText </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">msg</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># if the messages were locked, lock them again</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tLockedMessages </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tErrorText</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideThrow pMessage, pResult</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">throw</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(pMessage &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; pResult)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideThrow</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> sControlPropertiesToRead, sCardPropertiesToRead, sStackPropertiesToRead</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readStructureOfStackForDataView @pData, pParent, pLevel, pIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># 1) Get desired properties for the current stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readPropertiesOfControlForDataView"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> sStackPropertiesToRead, pData,pParent, pLevel, pIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   # 2) Process any cards</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   local tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   put empty into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   repeat with x = 1 to the number of cards of the target</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      # a) Get basic properties for the card</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readPropertiesOfControlForDataView" to card x of the target with sCardPropertiesToRead, pData, tStackIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      local tCardIndex</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      put the result into tCardIndex</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      if tChildCardIDs is empty then</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--         put tCardIndex into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      else</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--         put comma &amp; tCardIndex after tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      end if</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      # b) Process the card container for all its controls</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readStructureOfContainerForDataView" to card x of the target with pData, tCardIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      put the result into pData[tCardIndex]["children"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      put false into pData[tCardIndex]["expanded"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      put "container" into pData[tCardIndex]["style"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      put "card" into pData[tCardIndex]["type"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   end repeat</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   # 3) Process any subsctacks</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   repeat for each line tSubstack in the substacks of the target</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      if tChildCardIDs is empty then</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--         put the number of elements of pData + 1 into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      else</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--         put comma &amp; the number of elements of pData + 1 after tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      end if</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readStructureOfStackForDataView" to stack tSubstack with pData,tStackIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   end repeat</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   put tChildCardIDs into pData[tStackIndex]["children"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--put the number of cards of the target into pData[tStackIndex]["childCount"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">cards</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">substacks</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tStackIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"childCount"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tStackIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"expanded"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"container"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tStackIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"stack"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tStackIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readStructureOfStackForDataView</font></p>
<p></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--function __readStructureOfStackForDataView @pData, pParent, pLevel</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   # 1) Get desired properties for the current stack</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   dispatch function "__readPropertiesOfControlForDataView" to the target with sStackPropertiesToRead, pData,pParent, pLevel</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   local tStackIndex</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put the result into tStackIndex</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   # 2) Process any cards</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   local tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put empty into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   repeat with x = 1 to the number of cards of the target</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      # a) Get basic properties for the card</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readPropertiesOfControlForDataView" to card x of the target with sCardPropertiesToRead, pData, tStackIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      local tCardIndex</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      put the result into tCardIndex</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      if tChildCardIDs is empty then</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--         put tCardIndex into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      else</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--         put comma &amp; tCardIndex after tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      end if</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      # b) Process the card container for all its controls</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readStructureOfContainerForDataView" to card x of the target with pData, tCardIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      put the result into pData[tCardIndex]["children"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      put false into pData[tCardIndex]["expanded"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      put "container" into pData[tCardIndex]["style"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      put "card" into pData[tCardIndex]["type"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   end repeat</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   # 3) Process any subsctacks</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   repeat for each line tSubstack in the substacks of the target</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      if tChildCardIDs is empty then</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--         put the number of elements of pData + 1 into tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      else</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--         put comma &amp; the number of elements of pData + 1 after tChildCardIDs</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      end if</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--      dispatch function "__readStructureOfStackForDataView" to stack tSubstack with pData,tStackIndex, pLevel + 1</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   end repeat</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put tChildCardIDs into pData[tStackIndex]["children"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put false into pData[tStackIndex]["expanded"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put "container" into pData[tStackIndex]["style"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   put "stack" into pData[tStackIndex]["type"]</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--end __readStructureOfStackForDataView</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readStructureOfContainerForDataView @pData, pParentIndex, pLevel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># 1) Repeat for each control in the container</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tChildIDs, tChildCount</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">//repeat with x = 1 to the number of controls of the target</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--repeat for each line tControlId in the childcontrolIDs of the target</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">childcontrolIDs</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tChildCount</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">childcontrolIDs</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tControlId</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> revIDEGetPreference(</font><font color="#00007F">"ideProjectBrowser_sortOrder"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"bottom to top"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">childcontrolIDs</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tControlId</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> (tChildCount -x) + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">childcontrolIDs</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tControlId</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># read the properties of the control</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readPropertiesOfControlForDataView"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">control</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> tControlID </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> sControlPropertiesToRead, pData, pParentIndex, pLevel + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tChildIDs </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tChildIDs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">comma</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tChildIDs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">#  if the control is a group</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">control</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> tControlID </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"group"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tIndexStart</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pData </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tIndexStart</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readStructureOfContainerForDataView"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">control</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> tControlID </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> pData, tIndex, pLevel + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"children"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">--add the number of elements of pData - tIndexStart to x</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"expanded"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"group"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"control"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tChildIDs</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readStructureOfContainerForDataView</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Used internall but not private. This function is dispatched to the object and reads the properties</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># In the list. Sending it to the object allows the use of the target which reduces the lookup time</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># for each of the properties</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readPropertiesOfControlForDataView pList, @pData, pParentIndex, pLevel,pIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pIndex + </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pData + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tIndex</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pParentIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"parent"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--put empty into pList</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tProp </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>switch</b> tProp</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"short name"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][tProp]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"scriptlines"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">script</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][tProp]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"scriptstatus"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">scriptstatus</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][tProp]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"behavior scriptlines"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">script</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">behavior</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pData[tIndex][tProp]</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __readStructureOfStack @pData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># 1) Get desired properties for the current stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readPropertiesOfControl"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> sStackPropertiesToRead, pData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># 2) Process any cards</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">cards</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># a) Get basic properties for the card</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readPropertiesOfControl"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font><font color="#000000"> x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> sCardPropertiesToRead, pData[</font><font color="#00007F">"cards"</font><font color="#000000">][x]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># b) Process the card container for all its controls</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readStructureOfContainer"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font><font color="#000000"> x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> pData[</font><font color="#00007F">"cards"</font><font color="#000000">][x][</font><font color="#00007F">"controls"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tSubstack </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">substacks</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font></p>
