<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Subscription</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Stores subscriptions in the following format</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># sSubscriptions[message][callback targets] = List of object ID's</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>on</b> __ideAddSubscription pMessage, pCallingObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pCallingObject </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b> <b>if</b> pCallingObject </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">] <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; pCallingObject </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Already subscribed"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __ideAddSubscription</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Subscribes the calling object to receive the specified IDE message</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pMessage (string): The message to subscribe to.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectList (optional string): </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A list of objects, one per line, determining which calling objects the message should be restricted to.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on preOpenStack</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   ideSubscribe "ideSelectedObjectsChanged"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end preOpenStack</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on ideSelectedObjectsChanged</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   # Handle the notification</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end ideSelectedObjectsChanged</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">-- When the selection changes, subscribe to the idePropertyChanged message for the newly selected objects</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on ideSelectedObjectsChanged</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   ideSubscribe "idePropertyChanged", revIDESelectedObjects()</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end ideSelectedObjectsChanged</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Subscribe to messages to have a notification sent for particular IDE actions.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideSubscribe pMessage, pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Validate input</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageIsValid(pMessage) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"The message ("</font><font color="#000000">&amp;pMessage&amp;</font><font color="#00007F">") that you are trying to subscribe to is not valid. Please check the documentation for which messages you can subscribe to."</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the log ID of the calling object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Special case propertyChanged where we have to register for listeners for obejcts</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"idePropertyChanged"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDEPropertyRegisterListenerForObject tObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         __ideAddSubscription pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject, tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b> <b>if</b> pObjectList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         __ideAddSubscription pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject, tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      __ideAddSubscription pMessage, tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideSubscribe</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscribe pMessage, pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   ideSubscribe pMessage, pObjectList</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscribe</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Unsubscribes the calling object from the given message</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pMessage (enum): The message to unsubscribe from. </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObject (String): The long ID of the object you wish to unsubscribe from the message. This is an optional parameter, if not specified, the calling object will be used.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjectList (optional string): A list of objects, one per line.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUnsubscribe pMessage, pObject, pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If not object is specified, get the long ID of the calling object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pObject </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Special case propertyChanged where we have to register for listeners for obejcts</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"idePropertyChanged"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lineoffset</font><font color="#000000">(pObject, sSubscriptions[pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If the object is no longer needed, unlisten.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> sSubscriptions[pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            revIDEPropertyDeregisterListenerForObject tObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b> <b>if</b> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"ideMoveStack"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lineoffset</font><font color="#000000">(pObject, sSubscriptions[pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tObject][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Delete the calling object from the message: sSubscriptions[pMessage]["callback targets"]</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">lineoffset</font><font color="#000000">(pObject, sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]) &gt; </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lineoffset</font><font color="#000000">(pObject, sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUnsubscribe</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Unsubscribes the object from all messages</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObject (String): The long ID of the object you wish to unsubscribe from all message. This is an optional parameter, if not specified, the calling object will be used.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUnsubscribeAll pObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If not object is specified, get the long ID of the calling object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pObject </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Loop through messages and unsubscribe</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDEUnsubscribe tMessage, pObject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUnsubscribeAll</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Use to find out which messages the calling object is subscribed to.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (string): Return delimited list of messages, 1 per line.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the log ID of the calling object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCallingObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Build a list of all the message names the calling object is subscribed to</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tCallingObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[tMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">] <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMessage &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptions</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscriptions</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Use to find out which objects are subscribed to a given message</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pMessage (String): The name of the message.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (string): Return delimited list of object ID's, 1 per line.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscribedObjects pMessage</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Validate input</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageIsValid(pMessage) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"The message ("</font><font color="#000000">&amp;pMessage&amp;</font><font color="#00007F">") you are enquiring about is not valid. Please check the documentation for which messages you can subscribe to."</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESubscribedObjects</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">references: revIDESubscribedObjects (function), revIDESubscriptions (function), revIDEUnsubscribe (command), revIDESubscribe (command)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> ( \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><font color="#00007F">"ideAnswerDialogClosed,ideControlDeleted,ideCardDeleted,ideEditScript,ideExtensionLog,ideExtensionsChanged,ideExtensionStatusChanged,ideFindMoreWidgets,"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"ideInspectedObjectsChanged,ideLibraryStack,ideNewCard,ideNewStack,ideNewControl,revIDENameChanged,ideObjectSelectionStarted,ideOpenStack,"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"idePluginsChanged,idePreferenceChanged,idePropertyChanged,ideReleaseStack,ideResumeStack,ideSelectedObjectChanged,ideStackDeleted,ideToolChanged,"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"ideTutorialProgressChanged,ideWindowsChanged,ideMouseMove,ideDesktopChanged"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         )</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessages</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> revIDEMessageIsValid pMessage</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> (pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessages() \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"idePreferenceChanged"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"ideInspectObjects"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"ideToggleChanged"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageIsValid</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Sends the given message to all subscribed objects.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pMessage (string): The message to send</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pTriggeringObjects (optional string):</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A list, one per line, of the long ids of the objects triggering the message.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">This is used for example with the &lt;idePropertyChanged&gt; message to</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">convey which objects had properties changed.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pParamsArray (array): </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A numerically keyed aray (starting at 1) of the parameters to pass along with the message.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Sends &lt;pMessage&gt; to all objects which have subscribed to it using</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&lt;revIDESubscribe&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: ideSubscribe (command), idePropertyChanged (message)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSendWithParameters pMessage, pTriggeringObjects, pParamsArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Validate input</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageIsValid(pMessage) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"The message ("</font><font color="#000000">&amp;pMessage&amp;</font><font color="#00007F">") you have requested to be sent is not a valid IDE message. Please check the documentation for which messages you can subscribe to."</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If in run mode don't send any updates</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">//if the tool is not "pointer tool" then exit ideMessageSendWithParameters</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptionList, tTargetsA, tSubscription</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Add all universal subscribers to the subscription list</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[pMessage][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptionList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Add any per-object subscriptions</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tLine </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pTriggeringObjects</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">","</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tLine </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscription</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tTarget </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sSubscriptions[tSubscription][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback targets"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tSubscriptionList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTarget </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptionList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tTarget </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptionList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Send the message!</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">":"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMessage</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pMessage </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMessage</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Construct a dispatch command with all the desired parameters</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDoString, tParams, tErrors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"dispatch tMessage to tObjectID"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDoString</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If this is a parameterised message, add the parameter as the first arg</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pMessage &gt; </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">" with item 2 of pMessage"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tParams</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> tParam = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pParamsArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tParams </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">" with pParamsArray["</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tParam &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"]"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tParams</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">", pParamsArray["</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tParam &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"]"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tParams</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tParams </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tDoString</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObjectID </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tSubscriptionList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># if the callback object doesn't exist, don't send message</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(tObjectID) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDEUnsubscribeAll tObjectID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Ensure any error doesn't prevent subsequent subscribers from receiving messages</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">do</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDoString</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>catch</b> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tErrors </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tErrors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tError </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tErrors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">unlock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tErrors </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Error when sending message"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pMessage &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">":"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tErrors)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSendWithParameters</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- 0 or 1 param special case</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSend pMessage, pParam</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tParam</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pParam </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pParam </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tParam[</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   ideMessageSendWithParameters pMessage, </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">target</font><font color="#000000">, tParam</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSend</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSendWithTrigger pMessage, pTriggeringObjects, pParam</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tParam</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pParam </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pParam </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tParam[</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   ideMessageSendWithParameters pMessage, pTriggeringObjects, tParam</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMessageSendWithTrigger</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageSend pMessage, pTriggeringObjects</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tParamsArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pTriggeringObjects </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tParamsArray[</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   ideMessageSendWithParameters pMessage, pTriggeringObjects, tParamsArray</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEMessageSend</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Data</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns information about the predefined graphic objects.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: an array, keyed by the predefined graphic object types that</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">appear in the Tools palette, of properties associated with each of those</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">graphic objects.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGraphics</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sClassicObjectProperties </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tReturnData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> sClassicObjectProperties[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"graphic"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[tIndex] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tReturnData[tIndex]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tReturnData</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGraphics</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns information about the graphic creation tools.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: an array, keyed by the graphic creation tool types that appear</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">in the Tools palette, of properties associated with the objects created</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">by each of those graphic creation tools.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGraphicTools</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sClassicObjectProperties </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tReturnData</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tReturnData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tIndex </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.widget"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> sClassicObjectProperties[tIndex][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"button,field,scrollbar,player,image,data grid"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> sClassicObjectProperties[tIndex] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tReturnData[tIndex]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tReturnData</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEClassicControls</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEWidgets</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEExtensions(</font><font color="#00007F">"widget"</font><font color="#000000">,</font><font color="#00007F">"installed"</font><font color="#000000">, </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEWidgets</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">For a given list of objects, returns a structured array of properties, values and other meta data.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjects (string list): A list of IDs of the objects to obtain the properties for.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Return (Array): An array of data about the objects' properties.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">local tPropsArray</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">create button</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put revIDEGetPropertiesOfObjects(it) into tPropsArray</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># Get a list of the sections needed to display this object's property inspector</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">local tSections</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put the keys of tPropsArray into tSections</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&lt;revIDEGetPropertiesOfObjects&gt; returns an array of data about the given objects'</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">shared properties, in a form used by the property inspector. The array has a sub-array</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">for each section of the inspector in which one of the shared properties falls. Each of</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">these sub-arrays has a sub-array for each group within the section in which one of the</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">shared properties falls, each of which in turn has a sub-array for each property,</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">containing the values and metadata associated with it.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetPropertiesOfObjects pObjects</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Validation that all the objects in the list exist</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjects</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(tObject) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Not all objects in the list provided exist"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Work out the type of the selected objects</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tObjectTypeList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideObjectTypesFromObjectList(pObjects) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000">  tObjectTypeList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get this list of all the properties to read for the given type list</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __objectPropertiesShared(tObjectTypeList, </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Generate a list of the properties we want to retreive</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertyValues</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjects</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"__readPropertiesOfControl"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties, tPropertyValues</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tPropertyName </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tPropertyValues</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tPropertyName </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"effective"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tPropertyValues[</font><font color="#00007F">"effective"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tPropertyName] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertyValues[</font><font color="#00007F">"effective"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tPropertyName] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties[tPropertyName][</font><font color="#00007F">"effective value"</font><font color="#000000">][tObject]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropertyValues[tPropertyName] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties[tPropertyName][</font><font color="#00007F">"value"</font><font color="#000000">][tObject]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">//put the executioncontexts &amp; return &amp; the milliseconds &amp; return &amp; return &amp; return after msg</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSharedProperties</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetPropertiesOfObjects</font></p>
<p></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> sContinuousRangeArray[pProperty]</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">in memory, taking into account the Show IDE Stacks preference.</font></i></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tShowIDEStacks <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">mainstacks</font></p>

<p></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">## No nothing this is the correct order</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tMainStacks </font><font color="#7F007F">down</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tMainStacks &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tInvertedMainStacks</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Gets the data associated with all the frontscripts.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (array): A numerically keyed (for ordering) array with property:value pairs for each key.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEFrontScripts</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the list of frontscripts</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If IDE elements are on not showing, filter the list for rev stacks</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFrontScripts</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __ideFilterObjectIDListWithPreference(</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">frontscripts</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFrontScripts</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Create the list of properties to retrieve</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"short name"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"scriptlines"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"scriptstatus"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"long id"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProperties</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Loop through the frontscripts getting the required properties</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># and build the return array</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCount, tData</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The IDE has a repository of icon images which are used for ui elements in the IDE. The revIDEIconID function converts a "name-size" tag into a LiveCode ID suitable for direct use.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pIcon (String): The "name-size" tag for the given icon. The name is the name of the icon. The size is the size of the icon and should be one of 16, 24, 32, 64, 128</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">tags:icons</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example: set the icon of button 1 to revIDEIconID("help-32")</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (integer): The id of the image object on the revIconsNew stack.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIconID pIcon</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#7F007F">image</font><font color="#000000"> pIcon </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"reviconsnew"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> pIcon &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#00007F">" does not exist"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">ID</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">image</font><font color="#000000"> pIcon </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"reviconsnew"</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIconID</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The IDE uses a number of referenced images as icons, to ensure these images do not clash with user images IDs in the reserved range are assigned. The reserved range is 101000 to 103000</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (integer): The next available ID in the reserved range.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kFirstReservedIconID = </font><font color="#00007F">101000</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">chars</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tThemeFolderStart + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tThemeFolder</font></p>

<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The parent stack of an object</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pLongID: The long id of an object</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: the long id of the parent stack of &lt;pLongID&gt;</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns the long id of the (immediate) parent stack of the object with long id &lt;pLongID&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">To retrieve the mainstack of an object, use the &lt;ideMainStackOfObject&gt; function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: ideMainStackOfObject (function)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideStackOfObject pLongID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tOffset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">wordOffset</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#00007F">"stack"</font><font color="#000000">,pLongID) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tOffset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">word</font><font color="#000000"> tOffset </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pLongID</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideStackOfObject</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The mainstack containing an object</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pLongID: The long id of an object</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: the long id of the mainstack containing &lt;pLongID&gt;</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns the long id of the mainstack of the object with long id &lt;pLongID&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">To retrieve the immediate parent stack of an object which may be a substack, </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">use the &lt;ideStackOfObject&gt; function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: ideStackOfObject (function)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">word</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStack </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"stack"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSelobj</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>

<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Actions</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> sDownloadData, sDownloadStatus, sDownloadQueue</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEDownloadFile pURL, pTargetDirectory, pCallbackTarget, pProgressMessageName, pCompleteMessageName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pURL </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"htt,ftp"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cannot download file"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; pURL &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">". It is not a valid URL."</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> pTargetDirectory <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cannot download file. Target directory"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; pTargetDirectory &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"does not exist"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pURL </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> sDownloadQueue <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"File already in download queue"</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Store data in download queue</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pTargetDirectory &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pURL </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sDownloadData[pURL][</font><font color="#00007F">"file"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pCallbackTarget </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sDownloadData[pURL][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback_target"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pProgressMessageName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sDownloadData[pURL][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback_progress_message"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pCompleteMessageName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sDownloadData[pURL][</font><font color="#00007F">"callback_complete_message"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sDownloadQueue </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set all the properties to their default</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pPropsInfoA[</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">][</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> pPropsInfoA[</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">][</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"no_default"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDESetPropertyOfObject pObjectID, </font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">, pPropsInfoA[</font><font color="#00007F">"style"</font><font color="#000000">][</font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000">] </font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">key</font><font color="#000000"> tProperty </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pPropsInfoA</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"default"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPropInfoA <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tPropInfoA[</font><font color="#00007F">"read_only"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>command</b>  __setSizeToPreference pObjectID, pObjectType  </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tWidthPref, tHeightPref</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>switch</b> pObjectType </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Button"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.DefaultButton"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.RectangleButton"</font></p>

<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> __objectTypeIsControl pObjectTypeID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>switch</b> pObjectTypeID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Stack"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.Substack"</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>default</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>switch</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __objectTypeIsControl</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDECreateObject pObjectTypeID, pTarget, pLoc</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> __objectTypeIsControl(pObjectTypeID) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Object must be a control"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(pTarget) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cannot create object. Target does not exist: "</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pTarget)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectTypeID </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"No such object type ID: "</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pTarget)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> sClassicObjectProperties </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> __objectPropertiesRead</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set the default stack to the target we're creating the object on</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultstack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackOfObject(pTarget)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pLoc </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">loc</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">this</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pLoc</font></p>
