<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Create the object</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPropInfoA, tObjPropsA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get the engine control type</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pObjectTypeID </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCreatedControlID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Create data grid</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> pObjectTypeID </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"com.livecode.interface.classic.DataGrid"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- data grid library expects a rect rather than a loc</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">round</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> cTabButtonWidth </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revPreferences"</font><font color="#000000"> / </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000">), </font><font color="#7F007F">round</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> cTabButtonHeight </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revPreferences"</font><font color="#000000"> / </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect + </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> cTabButtonWidth </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revPreferences"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect + </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> cTabButtonHeight </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revPreferences"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tCreateRect</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> lDataGrid</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> lDataGrid </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- select data grid at end not single control</font></b></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set the default stack to the target we're creating the object on</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultstack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">owner</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tTarget</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Create the object</font></b></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set all the properties to their default</font></b></p>

<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Name: revIDEGroupObjects</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Type: command</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Syntax: revIDEGroupObjects &lt;objectList&gt;</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Summary: Group a list of objects in their layer order</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Group a list of objects in the order they are layered in</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">objectList (string): A return delimited list of long object IDs</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The result:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">An error string</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">It:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The new group long ID or empty in the case the group could not be created</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGroupObjects pObjectIDs</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pObjectIDs </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Sets the property of each object in the list to the value specified</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pObjects (String): A list, one per line, of the long IDs of the target objects</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pProperty (String): The name of the property to set</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pValue (Any): The value to set the property to</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example: revIDESetPropertyOfObject the long ID of button 1, "label", "Go Next Card"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pProperty </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"You must specify a property name"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> pProperty </font><font color="#7F007F">contains</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"["</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># OK-2008-07-24 : Use call instead of send here to prevent problems with the defaultStack changing.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Specifically this fixes an issue when debugging, if the user steps into a handler located in a script that</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># is not being edited, the script gets added to the editor, which causes the the defaultStack to change</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># and potentially breaks the debug being run in the debugger.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">call</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revSEAddTargetObject tObject"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tEditor</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">call</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revSESetCurrentObject tObject"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tEditor</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tLoc + pAmount </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tLoc</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">loc</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tObj </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tLoc</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDENudgeControls</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Utility</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Similar in functionality to specialFolderPath, it returns paths the folders with the IDE structure.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pKey (enum): The key for the folder you wish the retrieve.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- IDE: Returns the path the base IDE folder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- Object Property Definitions: Returns the path to the folder containing the object property definition files</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (string): the folder on the local file system where the IDE is stored.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">local tIDEFolder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put revIDESpecialFolderPath("IDE") into tIDEFolder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath pKey, pParam</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>switch</b> pKey</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList</font></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Stores the current default folder.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pFolder (optional string): The new defaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Related: revIDEPopDefaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on myHandler</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   revIDEPushDefaultFolder "/"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   repeat for each line tLine in the files</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">      # Do something to the files</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   end repeat</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   revIDEPopDefaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end myHandler</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Pushes the current defaultFolder onto a list of defaultFolders.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">If &lt;pFolder&gt; is specified, then the defaultFolder is set to &lt;pFolder&gt;.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEPopDefaultFolder then pops the list and sets the </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">default folder to the popped value.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPushDefaultFolder pFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultfolder</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList[</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pFolder </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultFolder</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> pFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Invalid default folder:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pFolder) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPushDefaultFolder</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Restores the default folder to the last saved path.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Related: revIDEPushDefaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">on myHandler</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   revIDEPushDefaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   set the defaultfolder to "/"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   repeat for each line tLine in the files</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">      # Do something to the files</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   end repeat</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   revIDEPopDefaultFolder</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end myHandler</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Pops the last stored defaultFolder and sets the </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">default folder to the popped value.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   **/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPopDefaultFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tToPop</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tToPop</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tToPop </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Mismatched default folder store / restore"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultfolder</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList[tToPop]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"Folder to restore no longer exists"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">variable</font><font color="#000000"> sDefaultFolderList[tToPop]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError  </font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPopDefaultFolder</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">summary: Outputs a flat version of an array to the messagebox.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pArray (Array): The array you which to convert</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (String): A text representation of the array with indented with the tab character for readability</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i><font color="#000000">  </font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revPutArray pArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pArray </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"not an array"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>exit</b> revPutArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revFormatArrayForDisplay(pArray)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revPutArray</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">summary: Converts an array into a human readable format that can be output to the message box when debugging.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pArray (Array): The array you which to convert</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">returns (String): A text representation of the array with indented with the tab character for readability</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revFormatArrayForDisplay pArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> (</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pArray) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"not an array"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>exit</b> revFormatArrayForDisplay</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> pLevel, pCounter, pList</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pLevel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pCounter</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __dumpArrayRecurse(pArray, pLevel, pCounter, pList) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> pList</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revFormatArrayForDisplay</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEResizeImageInBounds tImageID, tDesiredWidth,tDesiredHeight</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(tImageID) <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEResizeImageInBounds</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID &lt; tDesiredWidth </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">height</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID &lt; tDesiredHeight <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEResizeImageInBounds</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCurrentWidth, tCurrentHeight</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCurrentWidth</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">height</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCurrentHeight</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tscaleFactor</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">lockloc</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImageID * tscaleFactor</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns a list of all the display names of stacks recognised by the IDE as a palette.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAvailablePalettes</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Menubar,Tools,Inspector,Message Box,Project Browser,Extension Manager,Extension Builder,Start Center,Welcome,Menu Builder,Message Watcher,Plugin Preferences,"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"Standalone Settings,About,Dictionary,Guide,Resource Center,Preferences,Search,Snippet Viewer"</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAvailablePalettes</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPaletteToStackName pPalette</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># This abstraction is here because other aspects of the IDE need to know the avaiable palettes.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># For example, the view menu listing all the available palettes and their state. Leaving this check </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># in, rather than having a default in the switch forces developers to add any new palettes to revIDEAvailablePalettes()</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pPalette </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEAvailablePalettes() <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"No available palette with name"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pPalette)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># The inspector stack is now a manager for property inspectors, </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># and does not need to be visible.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">go</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">invisible</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName </font><font color="#7F007F">as</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">palette</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>default</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> __revIDEError(</font><font color="#00007F">"No such palette:"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pPaletteName)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>switch</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">show</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEMessageSend </font><font color="#00007F">"ideOpenPalette"</font><font color="#000000">, pPaletteName</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEOpenPalette</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPaletteIsVisible pPaletteName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPaletteToStackName(pPaletteName) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">visible</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPaletteIsVisible</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEOpenInspectorForObjects pObjects</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEOpenPalettes</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Determines whether an object is considered part of the IDE</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pLongID: The long id of the object.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (boolean):</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Use the &lt;revIDEObjectIsOnIDEStack&gt; function to determine whether an object is</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">considered part of the IDE, that is if it is on a stack whose mainstack is part</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">of the IDE, according to the &lt;revIDEStackIsIDEStack&gt; function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: revIDEStackIsIDEStack (function)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEObjectIsOnIDEStack pLongID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(pLongID) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMainStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> ideMainStackOfObject(pLongID) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMainStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackIsIDEStack(tMainStack)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEObjectIsOnIDEStack</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Determines whether a stack is considered part of the IDE</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pLongID: The long id of the stack.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (boolean):</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Use the &lt;revIDEStackIsIDEStack&gt; function to determine whether a stack is</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">considered part of the IDE.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A stack is considered part of the IDE if it exists, and</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name begins with "rev"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name begins with "com.livecode."</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name is "message box, answer dialog, ask dialog, or home"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&gt;*Note:* If the name of the stack is already available, it is more efficient to</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">use the &lt;revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack&gt; function.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">References: revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack (function)</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackIsIDEStack pLongID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(pLongID) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack(</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pLongID)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackIsIDEStack</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Determines whether a stack is considered part of the IDE</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pStackName: The short name of the stack</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns (boolean):</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Use the &lt;revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack&gt; function to determine whether a stack is</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">considered part of the IDE, according to the name of the stack.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A stack is considered part of the IDE if any of the following are satisfied:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name begins with "rev"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* It was loaded by the initialisation library</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name begins with "com.livecode."</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its name is "message box, answer dialog, ask dialog, or home"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">* Its _ideoverride property is true</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">**/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack pStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- call revStackNameIsIDEStack in revcommonlibrary</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> revStackNameIsIDEStack(pStackName)</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackNameIsIDEStack</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEItemiseArray pArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> (</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pArray) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"not an array"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>exit</b> revIDEItemiseArray</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tNewSet <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tArrayKeys </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"new set"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tArrayKeys</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"new set"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tArrayKeys</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--if tNewSet then put return &amp; "new set" after tArrayKeys</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">## Move "newKey" to the end</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSingleKeys &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tArrayKeys </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tOrderedKeys</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tKey </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tOrderedKeys</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">add</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> pCounter</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pCounter &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">comma</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tChildren</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pParent </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"parent"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pLevel + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"level"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tKey </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"key"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> (</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">keys</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pArray[tKey]) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"false"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"expanded"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"element"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pArray[tKey] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"value"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"false"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"expanded"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"array"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[pCounter][</font><font color="#00007F">"type"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> arrayRecurse(pArray[tKey], (pLevel + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">), pCounter, pList, pCounter) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tChildren</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"true"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pList[</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tChildren][</font><font color="#00007F">"lastSibling"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tThrottlePropertyChanged </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> pLockUpdates <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tObject </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pObjectList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackOfObject(tObject) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStack</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFoldersA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"user extensions"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFoldersA[</font><font color="#00007F">"user"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCount = </font><font color="#00007F">0</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tFolder </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> revEnvironmentExtensionsPaths()</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- In an installed build revEnvironmentExtensionsPaths() returns</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- sToolsPath &amp; "/Extensions" (the dev layout path), whereas the</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- bundled extensions actually live in packaged_extensions.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- revIDESpecialFolderPath("extensions") already handles this</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- redirect, so delegate to it in installed mode.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> revEnvironmentIsInstalled() <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"extensions"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">add</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tCount</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFolder </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFoldersA[</font><font color="#00007F">"ide"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tCount]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">script</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> it </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tDefaultScript</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Data grid</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#############</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kResourceStack = </font><font color="#00007F">"revDataGridLibrary"</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kTemplateStack = </font><font color="#00007F">"Data Grid Templates"</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kDefaultRect = </font><font color="#00007F">"0,0,300,500"</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">## pDataGridControl is long id of data grid control (default is "DataGrid" in revDataGridLibrary stack to copy to pStack (short name).</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">## pTemplateGroupSource is optional.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">command</font></b><font color="#000000"> AddDataGridToStack pStack, pRect, pDataGridControl, pTemplateGroupSource, @rGroupId</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> pStack <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">topstack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pRect </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">rect</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> kDefaultRect </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pRect</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> pDataGridControl <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">group</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"DataGrid"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">group</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Templates"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> kResourceStack </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pDataGridControl</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">length</font><font color="#000000">(pRootFolder) + </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilename</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- If the stack in question has a filename then we process.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tBaseFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">effective</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pObject </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tBaseFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tBaseFilename </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tEntry </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pValue</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#007F00">########################</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Standard IDE Library actions</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">########################</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Creates a new mainstack in the default location</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Associations: stack</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pWidth (optional number): The width of the newly created stack. If left empty, 400 is used</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pHeight (optional number): The height of the newly created stack. If left empty, 400 is used</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDENewMainstack</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDENewMainstack 100,100</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Tags: ide</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDENewMainstack pWidth, pHeight</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Set the width and height of the template stack</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Generate a unique name for the stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#00007F">"Untitled"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tNumber) <b>then</b>  </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">add</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b> <b>exit</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Setup the template stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">templateStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Untitled"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">visible</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">templateStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pWidth &gt; </font><font color="#00007F">100</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">templateStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> pWidth</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">width</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">templateStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">400</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">height</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">templateStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> pHeight</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Summary: Get the screenLoc for a stack based on the screen the stack is on</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pStackName (string): The name of a stack</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pWorking (boolean): If true return the loc relative to OS screen furniture rather than the full screen</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: The screenLoc of the screen the stack is on</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tScreenWidth</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect - </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenWidth</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tScreenHeight</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect - </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenHeight</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect + (tScreenWidth </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000">),</font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tScreenRect + (tScreenHeight </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">screen</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> pStackName) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">working</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">screenRects</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRect</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Route .hyperxtalk_project to the project loader</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tStackFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">ends</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProjectFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tStackFilePath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Windows / Linux: user opened the JSON file directly</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProjectFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- macOS: user selected the package folder; construct the inner JSON path</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tBundleLeaf, tProjectBaseName, tSavedDelim</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSavedDelim</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStackFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tBundleLeaf</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tSavedDelim</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#7F007F">length</font><font color="#000000">(tBundleLeaf) - </font><font color="#7F007F">length</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000">)) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tBundleLeaf </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProjectBaseName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackFilePath &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tProjectBaseName &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProjectFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDELoadFromProject tProjectFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Check the stack exists</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tStackFilePath <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEActionOpenStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Open the stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDEOpenStack tStackFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEActionOpenStack</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Closes an stack.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Associations: stack</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pStackID (String): The long ID of the stack to close</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pDestroy (Optional Boolean): True if the stack should be deleted from memory</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># Close the stack be keep in memory</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDECloseStack the long ID of the topstack</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># Close the stack completely removing it from memory</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDECloseStack the long ID of the topstack, true</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Tags: ide</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDECloseStack pStackID, pDestroy</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(pStackID) <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cannot close stack, it doesn't exist"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> revSaveCheck(pStackID) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> pDestroy </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDERemoveFromMemory pStackID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">close</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> pStackID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDECloseStack</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">## Create an image control by importing the image file onto the stack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">## Importing a paint file preserves the image file properties</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">## In particualar the repeatCount property is set to -1 for animated gifs and 0 for other images</font></b></p>
