<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Launches the standard ask dialog and returns the users selection.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pType (String): The type of file the be selected. If pType is not empty and not among the options below, it is assumed to be a custom filter in the form required by the ask command.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- image: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following image file types: JPEG, GIF, PNG.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- stack: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following stack file  types: lc, livecodescript, livecode.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- audio: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following audio file types: mp3, aiif, wav.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- video: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following audio file types: mov, mp4.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> pBasePath (Optional String): The default path that the ask dialog should point to when opened. If pBasePath is not specified, the "defaultFolder" is used.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> pInstructions (Optional String): The instructions to place in the title of the ask dialog. If not instructions are defined, default messages for each type are displayed.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> References:ask,defaultfolder</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> Returns: The path to the selected file.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> The result: Sets the result to "cancel" if the user cancels the ask dialog.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "/Users/xxx/Desktop/"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "/Users/xxx/Desktop/", "Please choose the video you would like to load"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "", "Please choose the video you would like to load"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Tags: ide</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAsk pType, pBasePath, pInstructions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># validate pType, pBasePath, pInstructions</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># pop up ask dialog</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># validate response</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># return response</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAsk</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Launches the standard ask dialog and returns the users selection.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pType (String): The type of file the be selected. If pType is not empty and not among the options below, it is assumed to be a custom filter in the form required by the ask command.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- image: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following image file types: JPEG, GIF, PNG.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- stack: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following stack file  types: lc, livecodescript, livecode.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- audio: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following audio file types: mp3, aiif, wav.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- video: Launches an ask dialog filtering for the following audio file types: mov, mp4.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> pBasePath (Optional String): The default path that the ask dialog should point to when opened. If pBasePath is not specified, the "defaultFolder" is used.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> pInstructions (Optional String): The instructions to place in the title of the ask dialog. If not instructions are defined, default messages for each type are displayed.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> References:ask,defaultfolder</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> Returns: The path to the selected file.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"> The result: Sets the result to "cancel" if the user cancels the ask dialog.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "/Users/xxx/Desktop/"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "/Users/xxx/Desktop/", "Please choose the video you would like to load"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">revIDEAsk "image", "", "Please choose the video you would like to load"</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Tags: ide</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAskFile pType, pInstructions, pBasePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># validate pType, pBasePath, pInstructions</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># pop up ask dialog</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># validate response</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># return response</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAskFile</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">A version of revIDEAnswerFile with a higher level notion of 'type'.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pTypes: a comma delimited list of types, which can be any of the following:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "stack": select a stackfile</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "image": select an image file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "video": select a video file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "audio": select an audio file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "media": select an audio or video file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "text": select a text file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">- "all": select any file</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pInstructions (optional string): the text to use as the file selection prompt.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pBasePath (optional string): the default path to open the dialog at.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pSingleFile (optional boolean): whether to restrict the selection to a single file or not </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAnswerFileWithTypes pTypes, pInstructions, pBasePath, pSingleFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTypesA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pTypes</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __answerGetTypeString(</font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pTypes) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tTypesA[x]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __answerGetDefaultInstructions(</font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pTypes) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pInstructions</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEAnswerFile </font><font color="#00007F">""</font><font color="#000000">, pInstructions, pBasePath, tTypesA, pSingleFile</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;revIDEStackFileVersion pStackFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">open</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">binary</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">read</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">read</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">from</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">8</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">close</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b>&nbsp;it </font><font color="#7F007F">begins</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"REVO"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">byte</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> it</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">mod</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">100</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;it </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1000</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; it </font><font color="#7F007F">mod</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1000</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">100</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- just in case</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;it </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1000</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; it </font><font color="#7F007F">mod</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1000</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">100</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; it </font><font color="#7F007F">mod</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">100</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">div</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">10</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#00007F">"2.4"</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackFileIsScriptOnly pStackFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">open</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">text</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">read</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">read</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">from</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">close</font></b><font color="#000000">&nbsp;</font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pStackFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">matchText</font><font color="#000000">(it, </font><font color="#00007F">"script \".</font><font color="#000000">*\</font><font color="#FF0000">"")</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackFileIsScriptOnly</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- The revIDESaveStack and revIDESaveStackAs handlers use the "save"</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- command with messages locked, which prevents the "saveStackRequest"</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- message from being sent to the stack being operated on.  However,</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- stacks may want to do work in "saveStackRequest", or even try block</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- saving entirely by handling the message rather than passing it.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- This function synthesizes a "saveStackRequest" message to the stack</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- &lt;tStackName&gt;.  If the message was handled by the stack, but not</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- passed, it returns "handled"; otherwise, it returns "passed" or</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- "unhandled".</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- In order to prevent "saveStackRequest" from being intercepted by</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- revfrontscriptlibrary, this function sets the magical global</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- variable gREVAllowSaveStackRequest.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- See bug 5569, bug 5890 and bug 16992</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> ideDispatchSaveStackRequest pStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDispatchStatus, tDefaultStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">global</font></b><font color="#000000"> gREVAllowSaveStackRequest</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> gREVAllowSaveStackRequest</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDefaultStack</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Display warning if user has not selected the latest file format</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tVersion </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">scriptOnly</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> tStackFileIsScriptOnly <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Saving in script only format will result in loss of data as only"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><font color="#00007F">" the script will be saved. Are you sure you wish to continue?"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"No"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Yes"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Yes"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDESetEdited tShortName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Cancelled"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Window and Mac automatically present overwrite dialog</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tVersion </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">platform</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Win32,MacOS"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tFilePath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">warning</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"File exists. Overwrite?"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cancel"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"OK"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cancel"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Cancelled"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># When making a substack a mainstack, it must clone default colors set on mainstack to substack</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># so that inherited values are preserved.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackColors, tHomeColors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tMakeMainStack </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> tMainStackName <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">colors</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackColors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">colors</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Home"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tHomeColors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> i = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">8</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> i </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStackColors </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> i </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tHomeColors </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> i </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStackColors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">colors</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tStackColors</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mainStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">cursor</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">watch</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- remove revOnline fingerprint</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revRemoveRevOnlineKey </font><font color="#00007F">"fingerprint"</font><font color="#000000">,tMainStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDESaveStack tMainStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">cursor</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">watch</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># RevOnline fingerprint enables the revOnline uploader automatically overwrite the stack if already uploaded.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Because you're saving as a new stack, this fingerprint should be removed.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">//eh revRemoveRevOnlineKey "fingerprint",tShortName</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Synthesize a "saveStackRequest" message</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tVersion </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"project"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDESaveAsProject </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName, tFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b> <b>if</b> ideDispatchSaveStackRequest(tShortName) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"handled"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDESaveStackAs </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName, tFilePath, tVersion</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">unlock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEActionSaveAsProject pStackID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tShortName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pStackID </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Prompt for save location</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">ask</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Save project as:"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEActionSaveAsProject</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFolderPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> it </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFolderPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> (tFolderPath </font><font color="#7F007F">ends</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tFolderPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Confirm overwrite if folder already exists</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> tFolderPath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"A project named '%1' already exists. Replace it?"</font><font color="#000000">, tShortName) \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Replace"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cancel"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cancel"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEActionSaveAsProject</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">cursor</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">watch</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDESaveAsProject pStackID, tFolderPath</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEActionSaveAsProject</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESaveAsProject pStackID, pFolderPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- pFolderPath is the full path to the project folder,</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- e.g. "/Users/emily/Documents/MyStack.hyperxtalk_project"</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- The main JSON file inside takes the same name as the folder.</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Derive base project name from folder (strip .hyperxtalk_project suffix)</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSavedItemDelim2, tFolderLeaf, tBaseName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSavedItemDelim2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFolderLeaf</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tSavedItemDelim2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#7F007F">length</font><font color="#000000">(tFolderLeaf) - </font><font color="#7F007F">length</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000">)) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tFolderLeaf </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tBaseName</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Create the project folder if it doesn't already exist.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- On macOS, .hyperxtalk_project packages report false for "there is a folder",</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- so also check for the inner JSON file as proof the package already exists.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tBaseName &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">no</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">create</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Could not create project folder:"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Error"</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Create the media subfolder for extracted assets</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMediaFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/media"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">no</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFolder <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">create</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Build the full object tree as a LiveCode array</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTree</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEProjectBuildTree pStackID, tMediaFolder, tTree</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Sanitize the tree: convert all leaf values to plain strings so that</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- boolean and data typed values don't trip up the JSON encoder.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEProjectSanitizeArray tTree</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Encode to JSON</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tJSON</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> jsonExport(tTree) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tJSON</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Write the main project JSON file</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFolderPath &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tBaseName &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".hyperxtalk_project"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">open</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">write</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Could not write project file:"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Error"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">write</font></b><font color="#000000"> tJSON </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">close</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMainFilePath</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Export first-card preview as preview.png inside the bundle.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Being part of the package it travels with the file automatically.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackName, tPreviewPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tShortName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pStackID </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Prompt for save location.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">ask</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Save library as:"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> tShortName &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".hxtlib"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> it </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEActionSaveAsLibrary</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFilePath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> (tFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">ends</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".hxtlib"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".hxtlib"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Confirm overwrite if file already exists.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tFilePath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"A library named '%1' already exists. Replace it?"</font><font color="#000000">, tShortName) \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Replace"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Cancel"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">cursor</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">watch</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEActionSaveAsLibrary</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESaveAsLibrary pStackID, pFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- pFilePath is the full path to the output .hxtlib file.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- The engine command "save stack as library to &lt;path&gt;" handles:</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   &bull; serializing the handler list (ASTN section via MCHXTASTWriter)</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   &bull; embedding the source script (SRCS section as fallback)</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">--   &bull; writing the binary container with CRC32/SHA-256 integrity checks</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">save</font></b><font color="#000000"> pStackID </font><font color="#7F007F">as</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">library</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> pFilePath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">error</font><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Could not save library:"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>exit</b> revIDESaveAsLibrary</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">answer</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELocalise(</font><font color="#00007F">"Library saved to:"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; pFilePath</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESaveAsLibrary</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tImageData </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMediaName, tMediaFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">short</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">name</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pControlID &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"_"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pControlID &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".png"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pMediaFolder &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tMediaName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">open</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFile </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">binary</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">write</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">write</font></b><font color="#000000"> tImageData </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tMediaFile</font></p>

<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Build a flat stack-level reference for property/script/text operations</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Control IDs are unique within a stack, so this works regardless of nesting depth</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackRef</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tType &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"id"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; tNewControlID &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"of stack"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; pStackName &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">quote</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackRef</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Restore all properties at once (script and image data handled separately)</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Strip "layer"/"number": restoring a card-level layer on a grouped control moves it</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- out of its group. Creation order already preserves stacking.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Strip "behavior": it is a long ID that changes on reconstruct; resolved by name below.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pControlNode[</font><font color="#00007F">"properties"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">array</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pControlNode[</font><font color="#00007F">"properties"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">variable</font><font color="#000000"> tProps[</font><font color="#00007F">"layer"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">variable</font><font color="#000000"> tProps[</font><font color="#00007F">"number"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">variable</font><font color="#000000"> tProps[</font><font color="#00007F">"behavior"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">properties</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStackRef </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tProps</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">print</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">this</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPrintCurrentCard</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPrintField pFieldID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">exists</font><font color="#000000">(pFieldID) <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEPrintField</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackName, tLabel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEStackOfObject(pFieldID) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">label</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLabel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tLabel </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">printTitle</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tLabel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">printTitle</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revShowPrintDialog </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">,</font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revPrintField </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFieldID</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEPrintField</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUndo</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Check the IDE undo list (cached object rects)</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">global</font></b><font color="#000000"> gRevUndoList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> gREVUndoList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If it is not empty, restore all the objects' rects</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> gREVUndoList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"width"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># In text selection context, ensure the target field is the focused one</font></b></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># OK-2009-10-02 : Code was breaking with groups named "Background", and seemed to be overcomplicated.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">defaultStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">topStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pGroupID </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">place</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">background</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> pGroupID </font><font color="#7F007F">onto</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">this</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">card</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">--flip graphic vertically</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTop, tBottom</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">top</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tGraphic </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tTop</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">bottom</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tGraphic </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tBottom</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tPoint </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tPoints</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- added BN in case a line is empty</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> tPoint </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">cr</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tNewPoints</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPoint, tTop + tBottom - </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPoint &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">cr</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tNewPoints</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">points</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tGraphic </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> tNewPoints</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEFlipGraphics</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEFlipImages pImages, pOrientation</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> revIDEEnsureControlsOfType(pImages, </font><font color="#00007F">"image"</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>exit</b> revIDEFlipImages</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Flip command can parse arbitrary image chunk expressions as of 6.7.8</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tImageLongID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tImage </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tImageLongID</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Parameters</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#   pModeNumber : the value of the "mode" property of an open stack</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00"># Returns</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">#   What style that mode corresponds to.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> stackModeName pModeNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>switch</b> pModeNumber</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"toplevel"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"modeless"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"palette"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>case</b> </font><font color="#00007F">5</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"modal"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">break</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>switch</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> stackModeName</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- Suspend Development Tools</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   Removes all IDE related backscripts and stacks so that an application can</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   run as if almost built as a standalone.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--   This affects:</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the frontscripts</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the backscripts</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the openstacks</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the current tool</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the windowBoundingRect</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--     - the script debug mode</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--  Note at present, holding down shift will cause *all* back and front</font></b></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTopMostStack &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tOtherstacks </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStacks</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tStacks </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> sWindowList <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStacks </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> sWindowList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEUpdateWindowList</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESendCurrentWindowToBack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">lock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tWindowsList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">windows</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tWindowsList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tWindows, tWindows2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tWindowsList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"1,2"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> l &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b> <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"3"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> l &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">after</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows2 </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows2</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCurrentStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">char</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> (</font><font color="#7F007F">lineOffset</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#00007F">"!c"</font><font color="#000000">,</font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">text</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">menu</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Window"</font><font color="#000000">)) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">text</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">menu</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Window"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCurrentStackName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lineOffset</font><font color="#000000">(tCurrentStackName,tWindows) </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">num</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows2 </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tWindows2 &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tWindows </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tWindows</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- delete char 1 to 2 of l</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">2</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">toplevel</font></b><font color="#000000"> l</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b> <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">mode</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">modeless</font></b><font color="#000000"> l</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">show</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> l</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">unlock</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">messages</font></p>
