<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns an array describing the recently opened stacks.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns: A numerically keyed array of recent stack labels and filename</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Example:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">local tRecentStacks, tRecentList</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put revIDERecentFiles() into tRecentStacks</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">local tStackInfo</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">repeat with x = 1 to the number of elements in tRecentStacks</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   put tRecentStacks[x] into tStackInfo</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">   put tStackInfo["label"] &amp; "|" tStackInfo["filename"] &amp; return after tRecentList</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">end repeat</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">delete the last char of tRecentList</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">put tRecentList</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># stack title|file path</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># stack title|file path</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># stack title|file path</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00"># ...</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Tags: ide</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDERecentStacks</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get recent paths from preferences</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetPreference(</font><font color="#00007F">"cRecentStackPaths"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If users have preference to sort recent list alphabetic, sort.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> revIDEGetPreference(</font><font color="#00007F">"cRecentSort"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"alphabetically"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">sort</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths </font><font color="#7F007F">by</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">last</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># ensure preferences take effect immediately</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   __trimRecentStacks tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Split list into array</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">split</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData </font><font color="#7F007F">by</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Generate labels for the stacks. The label is the filename without the file extension</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If two stacks have the same filename, the minimum path is added to the label to</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># distinguish the entries</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData[x] </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData[x][</font><font color="#00007F">"filename"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEFilepathUniqueLabel(tRecentPaths,tRecentPathData[x][</font><font color="#00007F">"filename"</font><font color="#000000">]) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData[x][</font><font color="#00007F">"label"</font><font color="#000000">] </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPathData</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDERecentStacks</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Validate parameters</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pFilePath <b>then</b> <b>exit</b> revIDEAddRecentStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Get recent paths preferences </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetPreference(</font><font color="#00007F">"cRecentStackPaths"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tRecentPaths </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFilePath </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFilePath &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; tRecentPaths </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDECleanRecentStackList(tRecentPaths) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   __trimRecentStacks tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">#Set the preference</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDESetPreference </font><font color="#00007F">"cRecentStackPaths"</font><font color="#000000">, tRecentPaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Notify registered stack of the change by sending an ideRecentStacksChanged message</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- BB needs to be implemented? Question. The general message sending in the IDE does not have "lock ide messages" option</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- So calling revIDEAddRecentStack is quick succession.. lets say in an "openAllStacks" handler is going to cause this message </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- fire multiple times in quick succession. lock ide messages could prevent the sending of messages and stack/replace them </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- and flush the queue on unlock ide messages.. resulting in just one version of the message being sent. </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   ideMessageSend </font><font color="#00007F">"ideRecentFilesChanged"</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEAddRecentStack</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">Trims the recent files to the user's preferred number</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>command</b> __trimRecentStacks @xStackFiles</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tNumRecent</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetPreference(</font><font color="#00007F">"cNumRecent"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNumRecent</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tNumRecent </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">integer</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      revIDESetPreference </font><font color="#00007F">"cNumRecent"</font><font color="#000000">,</font><font color="#00007F">15</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">delete</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tNumRecent+</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> xStackFiles</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __trimRecentStacks</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Given a list of filenames and a filename from the list, a unique minimal lable is returned. For example:</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/Desktop/test1/ben.livecode</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/Desktop/test2/ben.livecode</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/Desktop/test3/myProject.livecode</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Calling this function for each of these inputs in turn would return</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">test1/ben.livecode</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">test2/ben.livecode</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">myProject.livecode</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> revIDEFilepathUniqueLabel pFilepaths, pFilepath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdel</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"/"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tItemIsUnique, tLabel</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Repeat backward through the items of the filepath we're generating the label for</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> x = </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilepath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tItemIsUnique</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Repeat through the list of filepaths looking for items that match</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tPathInList </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pFilepaths</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Ignore the exact filename in the list</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tPathInList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> pFilepath <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">items</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPathInList &lt; x <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> -x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tPathInList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> -x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilepath <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tItemIsUnique</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If unique, add to the label and exit seach</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tLabel </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> -x </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilepath </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLabel</font></p>

<p><i><font color="#007F00">/*</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Cleans the list of recent file paths. Removes broken links (Stacks that have been subsequently removed), </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">removed duplicates and resolves the label when two stack have the same name but stored in different paths.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDECleanRecentStackList pRecentStackList</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentStack </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pRecentStackList</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Ignore broken links</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tRecentStack <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Ignore duplicates</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tRecentStack </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">among</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">lines</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tCleanList <b>then</b> <b>next</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Add to clean list</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tCleanList </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> tStackName </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorial </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorialList</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDETutorialLessonInfo(pCourse, tTutorial) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorialDataA[tCount][</font><font color="#00007F">"lessons"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tTutorial </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorialDataA[tCount][</font><font color="#00007F">"name"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tTutorialDataA[tCount][</font><font color="#00007F">"lessons"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">element</font><font color="#000000"> tLesson </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorialDataA[tCount][</font><font color="#00007F">"lessons"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">divide</font></b><font color="#000000"> tPercentage </font><font color="#7F007F">by</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tTutorialDataA[tCount][</font><font color="#00007F">"lessons"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIsFilesetStale(tInputs, tAPIDoc, </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">, tError) \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNeedUpdate</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># If there is an up-to-date api.lcdoc in the source folder, just copy that across</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tSourceAPI</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFolder &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"api.lcdoc"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tSourceAPI</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tSourceAPI <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tSource </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNeedUpdate</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">no</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> tAPIDoc <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               revIDESetUTF8FileContents tAPIDoc, revIDEUTF8FileContents(tSourceAPI)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b> <b>if</b> tNeedUpdate <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> revIDEIsFilesetStale(tInputs, tSourceAPI, </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">, tError) \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">                  </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               revIDESetUTF8FileContents tAPIDoc, revIDEUTF8FileContents(tSourceAPI)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNeedUpdate</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b> </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Regenerate the lcdoc file if required</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tNeedUpdate </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Generate the docs text in lcdoc format </font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDoc</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tExtensionData[</font><font color="#00007F">"source_type"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"lcb"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"revDocsGenerateDocsFileFromModularFile"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revDocsParser"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">                  tFolder &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tSource</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDoc</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>else</b> <b>if</b> tExtensionData[</font><font color="#00007F">"source_type"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"lcs"</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStack, tPassword</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">long</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">id</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> (tFolder &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tSource) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">password</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStack </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tPassword</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> tStack </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">and</font><font color="#000000"> tPassword </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">dispatch</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> </font><font color="#00007F">"revDocsGenerateDocsFileFromText"</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">                  </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revDocsParser"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">                  </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">script</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tStack, tStack</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDoc</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tDoc </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGenerateDistributedDocs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Load revdocsparser so its handlers are in the message hierarchy.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Dev builds use the repo ide-support path.  Installed builds use the</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Toolset/libraries path where the installer places revdocsparser.livecodescript;</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- the repo path is empty when installed, so using it throws EE_START_BADTARGET</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- and aborts the entire library load.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> revEnvironmentIsInstalled() <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">start</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">using</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> (revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"Toolset"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"/libraries/revdocsparser.livecodescript"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">start</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">using</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> (revEnvironmentRepositoryPath() &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"ide-support"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"revdocsparser.livecodescript"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEGenerateDistributedGuide</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEGenerateDistributedAPI</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDERegenerateBuiltDictionaryData</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGenerateDistributedDocs</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">filter</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFiles </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"*.lcdoc"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemDelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tFiles</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Check to see if we need to regenerate the docs</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tInputs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"api"</font><font color="#000000">, </font><font color="#00007F">"livecode_script"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">toLower</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -2 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tFile) &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".js"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tOutput</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">effective</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"revDocsParser"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tInputs[</font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tExtractedDocsFolder &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tFile </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tInputs[</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIsFilesetStale(tInputs, tOutput, </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">, tError) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tNeedUpdate</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Regenerate if necessary</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tNeedUpdate <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revDocsParseDocFileToLibraryArray(tExtractedDocsFolder &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; tFile, </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> -2 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> tFile, </font><font color="#00007F">"LiveCode"</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLibA</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Update the database</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         ideDocsUpdateDatabase </font><font color="#00007F">"livecode_script"</font><font color="#000000">, tLibA, </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revDocsFormatLibraryDocArrayAsJSON(tLibA) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tJSON</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         revIDESetUTF8FileContents tOutput, tJSON</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">on</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGenerateDictionaryHTML pWhich, pInitialLibrary, pInitialEntryName, pInitialEntryType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tGeneratedHTMLFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEGetDictionaryUrl(pWhich) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tGeneratedHTMLFile</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Ensure the docs-cache directory (e.g. 9_7_0_dp_1_/) exists before</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- writing api.html into it, and also ensure IDE/ exists for built_api.js.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- revIDESetUTF8FileContents silently fails when the parent folder is absent,</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- which leaves GoToURL unable to find the file and throws "error launching url".</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEEnsurePath revEnvironmentUserDocsPath()</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEEnsurePath revEnvironmentUserDocsPath() &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"IDE"</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tLibraryName, tEntryName, tEntryType</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pInitialLibrary </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLibraryName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pInitialEntryName </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tEntryName</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pInitialEntryType </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tEntryType</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDocsBase</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDESpecialFolderPath(</font><font color="#00007F">"documentation"</font><font color="#000000">) &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"html_viewer"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDocsBase</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDocsCSSFolder, tDocsJSFolder, tDataPath</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDocsBase &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"css"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDocsCSSFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDocsBase &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">"js"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDocsJSFolder</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Use a relative path (IDE/built_&lt;pWhich&gt;.js) so WKWebView resolves it relative</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- to api.html's own directory inside the docs cache. This avoids any cross-directory</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- file-access trust issues and eliminates space-encoding problems entirely.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"IDE/built_"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp; pWhich &amp; </font><font color="#00007F">".js"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDataPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- URL-encode spaces in absolute paths used in HTML src/href attributes.</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">replace</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">" "</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">with</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"%20"</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tDocsCSSFolder</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   revIDEAddRecentStack </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">effective</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">stack</font><font color="#000000"> pStack</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revUpdateRecentFiles</font></p>

<p><b><font color="#000000">command</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEShareStack pStackID</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tStackPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">effective</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">topStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">effective</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">filename</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">topStack</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tStackPath</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00"># Check remember username and password prefs</font></b></p>

<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kExtensionErrorCode = </font><font color="#00007F">863</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#7F7F00">constant</font></b><font color="#000000"> kExternalHandlerErrorCode = </font><font color="#00007F">634</font></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns the error description associated with the given </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">error code.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pType : either "compilation", "execution" or "warning"</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pCode : the id of the error as returned by the engine.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Returns : The description of the specified error. </font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&gt;*Note:* if &lt;pType&gt; is "warning", this function will currently return </font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">empty.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELookupError pType, pError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tCode</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pError </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tCode</font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">3</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pError </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFile</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">4</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pError </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tLine</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">merge</font><font color="#000000">(</font><font color="#00007F">"LCB Error in file [[tFile]] at line [[tLine]]: [[tDesc]]"</font><font color="#000000">)</font></p>

<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">----------------------------------------------------------------</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- Dependency management functions</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">----------------------------------------------------------------</font></b></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">/**</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Summary: Compute whether derived files are up-to-date</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Syntax: revIDEIsFilesetStale(pInputs, pOutputs, pRecursive, rError)</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Parameters:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pInputs: A numerically-keyed array of filenames, or a filename</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pOutputs: A numerically-keyed array of filenames, or a filename</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">pRecursive: True if folders should be checked recursively</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">rError: Set to a string describing an error, if necessary.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Description:</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">Checks whether the &lt;pOutputs&gt; are up-to-date relative to the</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&lt;pInputs&gt;, by checking the modification times on the files.  Returns</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">true if any of the &lt;pInputs&gt; are newer than any of the &lt;pOutputs&gt;, or</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">if any of the &lt;pOutputs&gt; are missing.  Returns false if all of the</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">&lt;pOutputs&gt; are up-to-date.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">If an error occurs, returns empty and sets &lt;rError&gt; to a descriptive</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">string.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">The &lt;pInputs&gt; and the &lt;pOutputs&gt; are file sets, and can either be a</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">single filename as a string, or a numerically-keyed array of filenames.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">It is an error for either file set is an array with non-numeric keys, or</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">for any filename to be the empty string.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">If either file set is empty, the return value is true.  It is an error</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">for any of the input filenames to be missing.</font></i></p>
<p></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">If &lt;pRecursive&gt; is true, any filename in the &lt;pInputs&gt; or &lt;pOutputs&gt;</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">that is a directory is scanned recursively and its files are added to</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">the fileset.  If &lt;pRecursive&gt; is false, it is an error for either file</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">set to contain directories.</font></i></p>
<p><i><font color="#007F00">*/</font></i></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIsFilesetStale pInputs, pOutputs, pRecursive, @rError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> pRecursive </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> pRecursive</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Make sure both filesets are non-empty arrays</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tInputs, tOutputs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __CheckFileset(pInputs) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tInputs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __CheckFileset(pOutputs) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tOutputs</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> (tInputs </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> (tOutputs </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- consider everything to be up-to-date</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Gather dates from each fileset</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tInputTimes, tOutputTimes</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __ScanFilesetMTimes(tOutputs, pRecursive, </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tOutputTimes</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> (tOutputTimes </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font><font color="#000000"> </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- an output file is missing, so update is required</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> __ScanFilesetMTimes(tInputs, pRecursive, </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font><font color="#000000">) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tInputTimes</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> (tInputTimes </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">array</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> tOutputTimes </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">array</font><font color="#000000">) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">throw</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"This should never happen"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tOutputTimes[</font><font color="#00007F">"min"</font><font color="#000000">] </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tInputTimes[</font><font color="#00007F">"max"</font><font color="#000000">] &gt; tOutputTimes[</font><font color="#00007F">"min"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>catch</b> tError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tError </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> rError</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>try</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDEIsFilesetStale</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- Converts pFileset to an array of at least one element and returns it.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- Return false if pFileset is an empty array or the empty string.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">function</font></b><font color="#000000"> __CheckFileset pFileset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pFileset </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">array</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">number</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">elements</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pFileset </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFileset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFileset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pFileset </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>else</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFileset </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tFileset[</font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFileset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __CheckFileset</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- Scan pFileset, returning the minimum and maximum modification</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- times found as an array with "min" and "max" keys.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- If pRecursive is true, scan directories in pFileset for the</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- modification times of each file they contain; otherwise,</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- encountering a directory is an error.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">--</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- If pAllowMissing is true, return false on encountering a missing</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- file; otherwise, it is an error for pFileset to contain a</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#007F00">-- missing file.</font></b></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> __ScanFilesetMTimes pFileset, pRecursive, pAllowMissing</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tResult</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tResult[</font><font color="#00007F">"min"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">0</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tResult[</font><font color="#00007F">"max"</font><font color="#000000">]</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> pFileset </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">an</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">array</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">throw</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Fileset is not an array"</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">element</font><font color="#000000"> tFilename </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> pFileset</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> __ScanFileMTime(tFilename, pRecursive, pAllowMissing, \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            tResult[</font><font color="#00007F">"min"</font><font color="#000000">], tResult[</font><font color="#00007F">"max"</font><font color="#000000">]) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>repeat</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> tResult</font></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">end</font></b><font color="#000000"> __ScanFilesetMTimes</font></p>
<p></p>
<p><b><font color="#000000">private</font></b><font color="#000000"> <b>function</b> __ScanFileMTime pFilename, pRecursive, pAllowMissing, \</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      @xMin, @xMax</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tDirname, tBasename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">set</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">itemdelimiter</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">1</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">to</font><font color="#000000"> -2 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilename </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDirname</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">item</font><font color="#000000"> -1 </font><font color="#7F007F">of</font><font color="#000000"> pFilename </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tBasename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tDirname </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"."</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tDirname</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> tBasename </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">throw</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Failed to check modification time: invalid filename"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Regular file</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMTime</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">file</font><font color="#000000"> pFilename <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> revIDELastModifiedTimeOfFile(tDirname, tBasename) </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tMTime</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tMTime </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> xMin </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">or</font><font color="#000000"> tMTime &lt; xMin <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMTime </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> xMin</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> tMTime &gt; xMax <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> tMTime </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> xMax</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Directory</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">local</font></b><font color="#000000"> tContents, tInnerFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">   <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">there</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">a</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#007F7F">folder</font><font color="#000000"> pFilename <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">      <b>if</b> pRecursive <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         revIDEPushDefaultFolder pFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">files</font><font color="#000000">() &amp; </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">folders</font><font color="#000000">() </font><font color="#7F007F">into</font><font color="#000000"> tContents</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">filter</font></b><font color="#000000"> tContents </font><font color="#7F007F">without</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">".."</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">filter</font></b><font color="#000000"> tContents </font><font color="#7F007F">without</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>

<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">the</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">result</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">throw</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#00007F">"Failed to set default folder"</font><font color="#000000"> &amp;&amp; pFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>if</b> tContents </font><font color="#7F007F">is</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">empty</font><font color="#000000"> <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">true</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         </font><b><font color="#007F00">-- Recursively scan files &amp; folders</font></b></p>
<p><font color="#000000">         <b>repeat</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">for</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">each</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">line</font><font color="#000000"> tInnerFilename </font><font color="#7F007F">in</font><font color="#000000"> tContents</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">put</font></b><font color="#000000"> pFilename &amp; </font><font color="#7F007F">slash</font><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">before</font><font color="#000000"> tInnerFilename</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>if</b> </font><font color="#7F007F">not</font><font color="#000000"> __ScanFileMTime(tInnerFilename, pRecursive, pAllowMissing, xMin, xMax) <b>then</b></font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">               </font><b><font color="#7F7F00">return</font></b><font color="#000000"> </font><font color="#7F007F">false</font></p>
<p><font color="#000000">            <b>end</b> <b>if</b></font></p>
